Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
   Preservation Of Exponentials Is Transported Along Weak Equivalences

  The universal property of the Rezk completion states that for every functor F : C₁ → C₂, with C₂ univalent, extends along the (unit of the) Rezk completion to a functor F' : RC(C₁) → C₂.
  In this file, we prove that if F preserves exponentials, then so does F'.

  1. Preservation Of Exponentials Transports Along Weak Equivalences [weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_exponentials']
 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Coreflections.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Reflection.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Preservation.Binproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.LiftPreservation.BinProducts.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Preservation.Exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Reflection.Exponentials.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Prelim.

  Context {C D : category} {F G : functor C D}
    (F_pP : preserves_binproduct F)
    (G_pP : preserves_binproduct G)
    (α : nat_trans F G).

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductOfArrows D q₂ q₁ (α x) (α y)
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP p q₂) =
z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁)
· α p

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductOfArrows D q₂ q₁ (α x) (α y)
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP p q₂) =
z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁)
· α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (BinProductOfArrows D q₂ q₁ (α x) (α y)
   · BinProductPr1 D q₂)
  (BinProductOfArrows D q₂ q₁ (α x) (α y)
   · BinProductPr2 D q₂) =
z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁)
· α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (BinProductPr1 D q₁ · α x)
  (BinProductOfArrows D q₂ q₁ (α x) (α y)
   · BinProductPr2 D q₂) =
z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁)
· α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (BinProductPr1 D q₁ · α x)
  (BinProductPr2 D q₁ · α y) =
z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁)
· α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁)
· α p =
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (BinProductPr1 D q₁ · α x)
  (BinProductPr2 D q₁ · α y)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
α p =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁
· BinProductArrow D
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
    (BinProductPr1 D q₁ · α x)
    (BinProductPr2 D q₁ · α y)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁
· BinProductArrow D
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
    (BinProductPr1 D q₁ · α x)
    (BinProductPr2 D q₁ · α y) = α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁
   · (BinProductPr1 D q₁ · α x))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁
   · (BinProductPr2 D q₁ · α y)) = α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁
   · BinProductPr1 D q₁ · α x)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP p q₁
   · BinProductPr2 D q₁ · α y) = α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (BinProductArrow D q₁ (# F (pr121 p))
     (# F (pr221 p)) · BinProductPr1 D q₁ · α x)
  (BinProductArrow D q₁ (# F (pr121 p))
     (# F (pr221 p)) · BinProductPr2 D q₁ · α y) = 
α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (# F (pr121 p) · α x) (# F (pr221 p) · α y) = α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (α (pr11 p) · # G (pr121 p))
  (α (pr11 p) · # G (pr221 p)) = α p

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
G_pP: preserves_binproduct G
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C
p: BinProduct C x y
q₁: BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
q₂: BinProduct D (G x) (G y)
α p =
BinProductArrow D
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)
  (α (pr11 p) · # G (pr121 p))
  (α (pr11 p) · # G (pr221 p))

    apply (BinProductArrowUnique _ _ _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP p)) ; apply idpath.
  Qed.

End Prelim.

(** * 1. Preservation Of Exponentials Transports Along Weak Equivalences *)
Section WeakEquivLiftsExponentialPreservation.

  Context {C₁ : category}
    (C₂ C₃ : univalent_category)
    {F : C₁ ⟶ C₃}
    {G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
    {H : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
    (α : nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F)
    (P₁ : BinProducts C₁)
    {P₂ : BinProducts C₂} (E₂ : Exponentials P₂)
    {P₃ : BinProducts C₃} (E₃ : Exponentials P₃)
    (G_weq : is_weak_equiv G)
    {F_pP : preserves_binproduct F}
    (F_pE : preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP).

  Let H_pP : preserves_binproduct H
      := weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α G_weq F_pP.
  Let G_pP : preserves_binproduct G
      := weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq.

  Section LiftPreservationPointwise.

    Context {x₁ y₁ e₁ : C₁} {ev₂ : C₂⟦P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁⟧}
      (ev₂_uvp : is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂).

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁) ⟧

      apply (z_iso_inv (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))).
    Defined.

    Let ev₁ := fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) _ _ ev₂' : (C₁⟦P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁⟧).

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
ev₂ =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · # G ev₁

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
ev₂ =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · # G ev₁

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
ev₂ =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G
    (fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁
       ev₂')

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
ev₂ =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · ev₂'

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
ev₂ =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· (let X :=
     pr2
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
identity (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · ev₂ =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· (let X :=
     pr2
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
identity (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· (let X :=
     pr2
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· (let X :=
     pr2
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
   let X0 := pr1 X in X0) =
identity (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

      apply z_iso_inv_after_z_iso.
    Qed.

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ev₁

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
is_exponent_uvp P₁ ev₁

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
is_exponent_uvp P₂
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq)
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · # G ev₁)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
ev₂ =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq)
     (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · # G ev₁

      apply ev₂_is_img_of_ev₁.
    Qed.

    Let αinv := nat_z_iso_inv α.
    Let α_iso (a : C₁) := nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a.
    Let αinv_iso (a : C₁) := nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) a.

    Let HG_pP := composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP.

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso (G ∙ H) HG_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso (G ∙ H) HG_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· BinProductPr1 C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (G ∙ H) HG_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
BinProductPr1 C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· BinProductPr2 C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct 
       (G ∙ H) HG_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· BinProductPr1 C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (G ∙ H) HG_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
BinProductPr1 C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· # H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
# H (pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))

  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧

αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso

   · # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
# H (pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))


        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
C₂
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
z_iso ?w (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
?g
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
   · # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
?g · pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
z_iso ?w (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

          apply (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ G_pP (P₁ _ _) (P₂ _ _)).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
   · # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP

  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H

ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
?b = # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃

· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b

            
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) = ?y'

            apply (precompWithBinProductArrow _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ _ _)).
          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
   · BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
     (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
   · BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
     (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
     (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂

αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) · # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) · # G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
identity (G (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) = identity (G (P₁ x₁ e₁))
