  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (identity
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
   · BinProductPr1 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (identity
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁)))

            now do 2 rewrite id_left.
          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
?b =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b

              apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ G_pP (P₁ _ _))).
            
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductPr1 C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

            
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr1 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr1 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr121 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) =
BinProductPr1 C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))

            apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· BinProductPr2 C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct (G ∙ H) HG_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· # H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
# H (pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
   · # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
# H (pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))


        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
C₂
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
z_iso ?w (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
?g
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
   · # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
?g · pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
z_iso ?w (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

          apply (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ G_pP (P₁ _ _) (P₂ _ _)).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· (BinProductArrow C₂
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
   · # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G

ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧

ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧

ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
?b = # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃

  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧

α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)

q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))

  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))

    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b

            
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) = ?y'

            apply (precompWithBinProductArrow _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ _ _)).
          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
   · BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
     (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
   · BinProductPr1 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
     (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
     (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
· # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) · # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
# G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) · # G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
identity (G (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) = identity (G (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))) =
BinProductArrow C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (identity
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
   · BinProductPr1 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
  (identity
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
   · BinProductPr2 C₂
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁)))

          now do 2 rewrite id_left.
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
?b =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
· pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b

            apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ G_pP (P₁ _ _))).
          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
BinProductPr2 C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
q:= preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_pr2 G G_pP
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)): # G (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductPr2 C₂
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) · pr221 (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₂
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))

          apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
    Qed.

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂) · α y₁)

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂) · α y₁)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂) · α y₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H
          (z_iso_inv
             (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
           · # G ev₁)) · α y₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · (# H
           (z_iso_inv
              (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                 (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
         · # H (# G ev₁))) · α y₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · (# H
           (z_iso_inv
              (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                 (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
         · (# H (# G ev₁) · α y₁)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
