x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · (# H
           (z_iso_inv
              (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                 (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
         · (# H (# G ev₁) · α y₁)))) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
   # F ev₁)
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · (# H
           (z_iso_inv
              (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                 (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
         · (# H (# G ev₁) · α y₁)))) = ?b

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
# H (# G ev₁) · α y₁ = ?t2

        apply (nat_trans_ax α _ _ ev₁).
      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · (# H
           (z_iso_inv
              (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                 (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
         · (α (P₁ x₁ e₁) · # F ev₁)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
    (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· α (P₁ x₁ e₁) · # F ev₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
    (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· α (P₁ x₁ e₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))


      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁ · identity (H (G x₁)))
  (identity d₃ · (g₃ · αinv e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· α (P₁ x₁ e₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· α (P₁ x₁ e₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))


      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· α (P₁ x₁ e₁) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))

C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂

  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧

α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)

g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
· α (P₁ x₁ e₁) = ?b

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (# H
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
   · α (P₁ x₁ e₁)) = ?b

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) · α (P₁ x₁ e₁) = ?t2

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
p_HG:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) · α (P₁ x₁ e₁) = ?t2

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
p_HG:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
t:= nat_trans_commute_with_binproduct_preservation p_HG
  F_pP α (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) 
  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)): BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) 
  (α x₁) (α e₁)
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso 
     (G ∙ H) p_HG (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) · 
α (P₁ x₁ e₁)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) · α (P₁ x₁ e₁) = ?t2

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
p_HG:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
t:= nat_trans_commute_with_binproduct_preservation p_HG
  F_pP α (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) 
  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)): BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) 
  (α x₁) (α e₁)
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso 
     (G ∙ H) p_HG (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) · 
α (P₁ x₁ e₁)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) · α (P₁ x₁ e₁) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso (G ∙ H) p_HG
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) · α (P₁ x₁ e₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
p_HG:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
t:= nat_trans_commute_with_binproduct_preservation p_HG
  F_pP α (P₁ x₁ e₁)
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) 
  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)): BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) 
  (α x₁) (α e₁)
· z_iso_inv
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso 
     (G ∙ H) p_HG (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) · 
α (P₁ x₁ e₁)
# H
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) =
z_iso_inv
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso (G ∙ H) p_HG
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))

        apply img_of_unique_binprodarrow.
      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) (α x₁) (α e₁)
   · z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) (α x₁) (α e₁)
   · BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) (α x₁) (α e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) (α x₁) (α e₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α x₁)
    (BinProductPr2 C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α e₁) =
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)


      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
   · BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · (BinProductPr1 C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α x₁))
  (BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
   · BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · (BinProductPr2 C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α e₁)) =
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α x₁) =
BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁)
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · 
   α e₁) = BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α x₁) =
BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁)
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α x₁) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b = BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁)
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP

  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H

   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in

  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α x₁) = ?b

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) =
?y'

          apply (precompWithBinProductArrow _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ _ _)).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
   · BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
  (BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
   · BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α x₁) =
BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁)

   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· (BinProductPr1 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α x₁) =

C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃

H: C₂ ⟶ C₃

P₃: BinProducts C₃

F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁) · α x₁) =
BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁) · α x₁ =
identity (F x₁)

        apply (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (α_iso _)).
      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α e₁) =
BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α e₁) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b = BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α e₁) = ?b

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) =
?y'

          apply (precompWithBinProductArrow _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ _ _)).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
   · BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
  (BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
   · BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α e₁) =
BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· (BinProductPr2 C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α e₁) =
BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
     (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
· BinProductPr2 C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))) · α e₁ =
BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
· (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)) · α e₁ =
BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃

C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃

  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧

BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
· (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁) · α e₁) =

C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁) · α e₁ = g₃

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁) · α e₁ =
g₃ · identity (F e₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
g₃ · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁) · α e₁) =
g₃ · identity (F e₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁) · α e₁ =
identity (F e₁)

        apply (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (α_iso _)).
    Qed.

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)
≃ f₃ =
  BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
    (g₃ · αinv e₁)
  · (BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     · # H ev₂)

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)
≃ f₃ =
  BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
    (g₃ · αinv e₁)
  · (BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     · # H ev₂)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
