E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)
→ f₃ =
  BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
    (g₃ · αinv e₁)
  · (BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     · # H ev₂)
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
f₃ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)
→ BinProductOfArrows C₃ 
    (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃) 
    (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
    (identity d₃) · f₃ · 
  α y₁ =
  BinProductOfArrows C₃ 
    (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)) (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
    (identity (F x₁)) g₃
  · (BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
isaprop
  (BinProductOfArrows C₃ 
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃) 
     (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
     (identity d₃) · f₃ · 
   α y₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₃ 
     (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)) 
     (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
      · # F ev₁))
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
isaprop
  (f₃ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₃ 
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))) 
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) 
     (identity (H (G x₁))) 
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂))

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)
→ f₃ =
  BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
    (g₃ · αinv e₁)
  · (BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     · # H ev₂)
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
pf: BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
  (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
f₃ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
pf: BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
  (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
f₃ · nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂) · nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y₁

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
pf: BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
  (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
binproduct_of_z_iso (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃) (αinv_iso x₁)
  (identity d₃,, identity_is_z_iso d₃)
· (f₃ · nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y₁) =
binproduct_of_z_iso (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃) (αinv_iso x₁)
  (identity d₃,, identity_is_z_iso d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂) · nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
pf: BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
  (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁) =
binproduct_of_z_iso (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃) (αinv_iso x₁)
  (identity d₃,, identity_is_z_iso d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂) · nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁) =
binproduct_of_z_iso (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃) (αinv_iso x₁)
  (identity d₃,, identity_is_z_iso d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂) · nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y₁)

        apply (equiv_of_binprodarrows_nat_eval_lr g₃).

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
f₃ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)
→ BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
    (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃) · f₃ · 
  α y₁ =
  BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
    (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
  · (BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
pf: f₃ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃) · f₃ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
pf: f₃ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂)) · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂)) · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃)
· BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
    (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁ · identity (H (G x₁)))
  (identity d₃ · (g₃ · αinv e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂ · α y₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁
· inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁
· inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁
· inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁
· inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁) = ?b

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
       (P₁ x₁ e₁))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) = ?y'

          apply (precompWithBinProductArrow _  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ F_pP (P₁ _ _))).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
     (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
   · BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
     (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
   · BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁
· inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃) · # F ev₁
· inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (# F ev₁ · inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (# F ev₁ · inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁)) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (# F ev₁ · inv_from_z_iso (α_iso y₁)) = ?b

          apply maponpaths, (nat_trans_ax αinv).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (αinv (P₁ x₁ e₁) · # (G ∙ H) ev₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (αinv (P₁ x₁ e₁) · # (G ∙ H) ev₁) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) 
  (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (αinv (P₁ x₁ e₁) · # (G ∙ H) ev₁) = ?b

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
# (G ∙ H) ev₁ = ?t2

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
# G ev₁ = ?t2

          apply functor_on_fully_faithful_inv_hom.
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (αinv (P₁ x₁ e₁) · # H ev₂') =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (αinv (P₁ x₁ e₁)
   · # H
       (pr12 (z_iso_inv
                (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                   (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))
        · ev₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (αinv (P₁ x₁ e₁)
   · (# H
        (pr12 (z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                    (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))))
      · # H ev₂)) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· αinv (P₁ x₁ e₁)
· # H
    (pr12 (z_iso_inv
             (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))))
· # H ev₂ =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
· # H ev₂

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· αinv (P₁ x₁ e₁)
· # H
    (pr12 (z_iso_inv
             (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
                (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (g₃ · αinv e₁)
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· # H
    (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
       (BinProductPr1 C₂
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
       (BinProductPr2 C₂
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· # H
    (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
       (BinProductPr1 C₂
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
       (BinProductPr2 C₂
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁)))) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· # H
    (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
       (BinProductPr1 C₂
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
       (BinProductPr2 C₂
          (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
             (P₁ x₁ e₁)))) = ?b

          
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
# H
  (BinProductArrow C₂ (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₂
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₂
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁)))) = ?t2

          apply (preserves_binproduct_to_preserves_arrow _ H_pP (P₂ _ _) (P₃ _ _)).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· (BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (# H
        (BinProductPr1 C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
              (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
     (# H
        (BinProductPr2 C₂
           (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct G G_pP
              (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
          (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
