α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· (BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (# H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
     (# H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
   · BinProductArrow C₃
       (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
       (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
       (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (# H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
    (# H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
       (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
    (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
    (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))

  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H

     (z_iso_inv

           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in

  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
· BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (# H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
    (# H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
   · BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
       (# H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
       (# H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
   · BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
       (# H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
       (# H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
   · BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
       (# H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
       (# H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))) = ?b
 apply maponpaths, precompWithBinProductArrow. 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     · # H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     · # H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     · # H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     · # H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · identity (F x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     · # H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     · # H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))) = ?b
 apply precompWithBinProductArrow. 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
      · # H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
      · # H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))) =
BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
      · # H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
      · # H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))) =
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
      · # H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
      · # H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))) = ?b
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
?b =
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
      · # H (# G (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)))))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (P₁ x₁ e₁))
      · # H (# G (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁))))) = ?b

          apply maponpaths_12 ; apply maponpaths, pathsinv0, (nat_trans_ax αinv).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (# F (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) · αinv x₁))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁))
     (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      · identity (F x₁))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (# F (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) · αinv e₁)) =
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (# F (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) · αinv x₁))
  (BinProductArrow C₃
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃))
     (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
   · (# F (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) · αinv e₁)) =
BinProductArrow C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α x₁))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
   · (g₃ · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α e₁)))

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· # F (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)

C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂

P₃: BinProducts C₃

  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H

x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· # F (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃

        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· # F (pr121 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃)
 apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ F_pP (P₁ _ _))).
        
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₃
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
     (P₁ x₁ e₁)) (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃))
  (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃)
· # F (pr221 (P₁ x₁ e₁)) =
BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) · g₃
 apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct _ F_pP (P₁ _ _))).
      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
isaprop
  (BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) d₃)
     (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (αinv x₁) (identity d₃) · f₃
   · α y₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))
     (P₃ (F x₁) d₃) (identity (F x₁)) g₃
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
      · # F ev₁))
 apply homset_property.
      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃, H (G y₁) ⟧
g₃: C₃ ⟦ d₃, F e₁ ⟧
isaprop
  (f₃ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))
     (P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃) (identity (H (G x₁)))
     (g₃ · αinv e₁)
   · (BinProductArrow C₃
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct H H_pP
           (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))
        (BinProductPr1 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
        (BinProductPr2 C₃ (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
      · # H ev₂))
 apply homset_property.
    Qed.

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
