ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
∃! g : C₃ ⟦ coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
                  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
                  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
             · # H ev₂)) ⟧,
d₃,, f₃ =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁))) g
· make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
          (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · # H ev₂)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
t:= Fev_uvp
  (d₃,,
   BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
        (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
     (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
   · α y₁): ∃! g : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃
                 (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            · f₃ · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
                  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
             # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(d₃,,
 BinProductOfArrows C₃
   (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
   (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
 α y₁
 :
 C₃
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
     (F x₁)
     (coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
         · f₃ · α y₁)), 
 F y₁ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F e₁)
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
∃! g : C₃ ⟦ coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
                  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
                  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
             · # H ev₂)) ⟧,
d₃,, f₃ =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁))) g
· make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
          (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
          (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · # H ev₂)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
t:= Fev_uvp
  (d₃,,
   BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
        (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
     (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
   · α y₁): ∃! g : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃
                 (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            · f₃ · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
                  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
             # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(d₃,,
 BinProductOfArrows C₃
   (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
   (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
 α y₁
 :
 C₃
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
     (F x₁)
     (coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
         · f₃ · α y₁)), 
 F y₁ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F e₁)
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
(∑
 g : C₃
     ⟦ coreflection_data_object
         (d₃,,
          BinProductOfArrows C₃
            (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
               (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
            (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
          · α y₁),
     coreflection_data_object
       (make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
          (z_iso_inv
             (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
           · # F ev₁)) ⟧,
 (d₃,,
  BinProductOfArrows C₃
    (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
    (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
       (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
    (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · α y₁
  :
  C₃
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)
      (coreflection_data_object
         (d₃,,
          BinProductOfArrows C₃
            (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
               (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
            (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
          · α y₁)), F y₁ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
 · make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁))
≃ (∑
   g : C₃ ⟦ coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
                  (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
                  (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
             · # H ev₂)) ⟧,
   d₃,, f₃ =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁))) g
   · make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
             (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
             (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · # H ev₂))

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
t:= Fev_uvp
  (d₃,,
   BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
        (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
     (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
   · α y₁): ∃! g : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃
                 (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            · f₃ · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
                  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
             # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(d₃,,
 BinProductOfArrows C₃
   (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
   (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
 α y₁
 :
 C₃
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
     (F x₁)
     (coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
         · f₃ · α y₁)), 
 F y₁ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F e₁)
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
C₃
⟦ coreflection_data_object
    (d₃,,
     BinProductOfArrows C₃
       (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
       (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
          (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
       (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
       (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
     α y₁),
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁))
⟧
≃ C₃ ⟦ coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃),
  coreflection_data_object
    (make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
             (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
             (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · # H ev₂)) ⟧
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
t:= Fev_uvp
  (d₃,,
   BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
        (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
     (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
   · α y₁): ∃! g : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃
                 (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            · f₃ · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
                  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
             # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(d₃,,
 BinProductOfArrows C₃
   (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
   (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
 α y₁
 :
 C₃
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
     (F x₁)
     (coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
         · f₃ · α y₁)), 
 F y₁ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F e₁)
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
∏
x : C₃
    ⟦ coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
         · α y₁),
    coreflection_data_object
      (make_coreflection_data 
         (F e₁)
         (z_iso_inv
            (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
               (P₁ x₁ e₁) 
               (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
          # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(λ x0 : C₃
        ⟦ coreflection_data_object
            (d₃,,
             BinProductOfArrows C₃
               (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                  (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
               (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                  (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
               (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
               (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
             · f₃ · α y₁),
        coreflection_data_object
          (make_coreflection_data 
             (F e₁)
             (z_iso_inv
                (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                   (P₁ x₁ e₁) 
                   (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
              # F ev₁)) ⟧,
 (d₃,,
  BinProductOfArrows C₃
    (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
    (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
       (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) 
    (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
    (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
  α y₁
  :
  C₃
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
      (F x₁)
      (coreflection_data_object
         (d₃,,
          BinProductOfArrows C₃
            (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
               (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
            (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
          · α y₁)), F y₁ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) x0
 · make_coreflection_data 
     (F e₁)
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
      # F ev₁)) x
≃ (λ y : C₃ ⟦ coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃),
         coreflection_data_object
           (make_coreflection_data 
              (H (G e₁))
              (z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
                    (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
                    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
               · # H ev₂)) ⟧,
   d₃,, f₃ =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁))) y
   · make_coreflection_data 
       (H (G e₁))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
             (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
             (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · 
        # H ev₂)) (?f x)

      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
t:= Fev_uvp
  (d₃,,
   BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
        (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
     (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
   · α y₁): ∃! g : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃
                 (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            · f₃ · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
                  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
             # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(d₃,,
 BinProductOfArrows C₃
   (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
   (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
 α y₁
 :
 C₃
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
     (F x₁)
     (coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
         · f₃ · α y₁)), 
 F y₁ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F e₁)
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
C₃
⟦ coreflection_data_object
    (d₃,,
     BinProductOfArrows C₃
       (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
       (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
          (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
       (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
       (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
     α y₁),
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁))
⟧
≃ C₃ ⟦ coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃),
  coreflection_data_object
    (make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
             (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
             (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · # H ev₂)) ⟧
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
t:= Fev_uvp
  (d₃,,
   BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
        (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
     (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
   · α y₁): ∃! g : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃
                 (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            · f₃ · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
                  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
             # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(d₃,,
 BinProductOfArrows C₃
   (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
   (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
 α y₁
 :
 C₃
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
     (F x₁)
     (coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
         · f₃ · α y₁)), 
 F y₁ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F e₁)
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
z_iso
  (coreflection_data_object
     (make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
        (z_iso_inv
           (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
              (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁)))
  (coreflection_data_object
     (make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
        (z_iso_inv
           (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
              (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
              (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · # H ev₂)))

        exact (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) e₁).
      
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
t:= Fev_uvp
  (d₃,,
   BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
        (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
     (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
   · α y₁): ∃! g : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃
                 (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            · f₃ · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
                  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
             # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(d₃,,
 BinProductOfArrows C₃
   (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
   (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
 α y₁
 :
 C₃
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
     (F x₁)
     (coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
         · f₃ · α y₁)), 
 F y₁ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F e₁)
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
∏
x : C₃
    ⟦ coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
         · α y₁),
    coreflection_data_object
      (make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
         (z_iso_inv
            (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
               (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
          · # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(λ x0 : C₃
        ⟦ coreflection_data_object
            (d₃,,
             BinProductOfArrows C₃
               (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                  (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
               (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                  (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
               (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
               (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
             · f₃ · α y₁),
        coreflection_data_object
          (make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
             (z_iso_inv
                (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                   (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
              · # F ev₁)) ⟧,
 (d₃,,
  BinProductOfArrows C₃
    (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
    (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
       (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
    (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · α y₁
  :
  C₃
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)
      (coreflection_data_object
         (d₃,,
          BinProductOfArrows C₃
            (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
               (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
            (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
          · α y₁)), F y₁ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) x0
 · make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁))
  x
≃ (λ y : C₃ ⟦ coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃),
         coreflection_data_object
           (make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
              (z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
                    (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
                    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
               · # H ev₂)) ⟧,
   d₃,, f₃ =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁))) y
   · make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
             (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
             (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · # H ev₂))
    (z_iso_comp_left_weq
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) e₁)
       (coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃)) x)
 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁, y₁, e₁: C₁
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
ev₂':= (let X :=
   pr2
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso G G_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)))) in
 let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · ev₂: C₂ ⟦ G (P₁ x₁ e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₁:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 G_weq) 
  (P₁ x₁ e₁) y₁ ev₂': C₁ ⟦ P₁ x₁ e₁, y₁ ⟧
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso F (G ∙ H)
α_iso:= λ a : C₁, nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso ((G ∙ H) a) (F a)
αinv_iso:= λ a : C₁,
nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso 
  (nat_z_iso_inv α) a: ∏ a : C₁, z_iso (F a) ((G ∙ H) a)
HG_pP:= composition_preserves_binproduct G_pP H_pP: preserves_binproduct (G ∙ H)
Fev_uvp:= F_pE x₁ y₁ e₁ ev₁ ev₁_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
        (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
   · # F ev₁)
d₃: C₃
f₃: C₃ ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁)) d₃,
H (G y₁) ⟧
t:= Fev_uvp
  (d₃,,
   BinProductOfArrows C₃
     (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
        (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
     (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
     (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
   · α y₁): ∃! g : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃
                 (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            · f₃ · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_pP (P₁ x₁ e₁)
                  (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
             # F ev₁)) ⟧,
(d₃,,
 BinProductOfArrows C₃
   (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
      (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
   (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
   (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · 
 α y₁
 :
 C₃
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ 
     (F x₁)
     (coreflection_data_object
        (d₃,,
         BinProductOfArrows C₃
           (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
              (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
           (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
           (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
         · f₃ · α y₁)), 
 F y₁ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (F e₁)
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
          (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · 
     # F ev₁)
g₃: C₃
⟦ coreflection_data_object
    (d₃,,
     BinProductOfArrows C₃
       (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
       (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
          (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
       (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
       (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
     · α y₁),
coreflection_data_object
  (make_coreflection_data 
     (F e₁)
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
      · # F ev₁)) ⟧
(λ x : C₃
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (d₃,,
            BinProductOfArrows C₃
              (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
                 (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
              (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
              (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
            · α y₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
                  (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁)))
             · # F ev₁)) ⟧,
 (d₃,,
  BinProductOfArrows C₃
    (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
    (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
       (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
    (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃ · α y₁
  :
  C₃
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)
      (coreflection_data_object
         (d₃,,
          BinProductOfArrows C₃
            (P₃ ((G ∙ H) x₁) (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (P₃ (constant_functor C₃ C₃ (F x₁) d₃)
               (functor_identity C₃ d₃))
            (nat_z_iso_inv α x₁)
            (identity (functor_identity C₃ d₃)) · f₃
          · α y₁)), F y₁ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₃ (F x₁)) x
 · make_coreflection_data (F e₁)
     (z_iso_inv
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_pP
           (P₁ x₁ e₁) (P₃ (F x₁) (F e₁))) · # F ev₁))
  g₃
≃ (λ y : C₃ ⟦ coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃),
         coreflection_data_object
           (make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
              (z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
                    (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
                    (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
               · # H ev₂)) ⟧,
   d₃,, f₃ =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₃ (H (G x₁))) y
   · make_coreflection_data (H (G e₁))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
             (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁))
             (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁)))) · # H ev₂))
    (z_iso_comp_left_weq
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) e₁)
       (coreflection_data_object (d₃,, f₃)) g₃)

        apply equiv_of_binprodarrows_nat_eval.
    Qed.

  End LiftPreservationPointwise.

  
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
preserves_exponential_objects P₂ P₃ H_pP

C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃

F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP

  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H

P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃

F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₂, y₂: C₂
∏ (e : C₂) (ev : C₂ ⟦ P₂ x₂ e, y₂ ⟧),
is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev
→ is_exponent_uvp P₃
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP (P₂ x₂ e)
          (P₃ (H x₂) (H e))) · # H ev)

e₂: C₂
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ x₂ e₂, y₂ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
e₁: C₁
ie: z_iso (G e₁) e₂
px:= isotoid (pr1 C₂) (pr2 C₂) ix: G x₁ = x₂
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP (P₂ x₂ e₂)
        (P₃ (H x₂) (H e₂))) · # H ev₂)

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
y₂: C₂
x₁: C₁
ix: z_iso (G x₁) (G x₁)
y₁: C₁
iy: z_iso (G y₁) y₂
e₂: C₂
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) e₂, y₂ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
e₁: C₁
ie: z_iso (G e₁) e₂
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) e₂) (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H e₂)))
   · # H ev₂)

  (z_iso_inv

pe:= isotoid (pr1 C₂) (pr2 C₂) ie: G e₁ = e₂
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) e₂) (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H e₂)))

C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃

α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G

F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP

  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H

x₁: C₁
ix: z_iso (G x₁) (G x₁)
y₁: C₁
iy: z_iso (G y₁) (G y₁)
e₁: C₁
ie: z_iso (G e₁) (G e₁)
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
        (P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁)) (P₃ (H (G x₁)) (H (G e₁))))
   · # H ev₂)


    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₁: C₁
ix: z_iso (G x₁) (G x₁)
y₁: C₁
iy: z_iso (G y₁) (G y₁)
e₁: C₁
ie: z_iso (G e₁) (G e₁)
ev₂: C₂ ⟦ P₂ (G x₁) (G e₁), G y₁ ⟧
ev₂_uvp: is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂
is_exponent_uvp P₂ ev₂

    exact ev₂_uvp.
  Qed.

  
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃

P₁: BinProducts C₁

E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ H_pP

  
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃ H_pP

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
preserves_exponential_objects' P₂ P₃ H_pP E₂

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
∏ x y : C₂,
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
        (P₂ x (exp (E₂ x) y))
        (P₃ (H x) (H (exp (E₂ x) y))))
   · # H (exp_eval (E₂ x) y))

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₂, y₂: C₂
is_exponent_uvp P₃
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso H H_pP
        (P₂ x₂ (exp (E₂ x₂) y₂))
        (P₃ (H x₂) (H (exp (E₂ x₂) y₂))))
   · # H (exp_eval (E₂ x₂) y₂))

    
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP
H_pP:= weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
  G_weq F_pP: preserves_binproduct H
G_pP:= weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts G_weq: preserves_binproduct G
x₂, y₂: C₂
is_exponent_uvp P₂ (exp_eval (E₂ x₂) y₂)

    apply is_exponentiable_to_uvp.
  Qed.

End WeakEquivLiftsExponentialPreservation.


C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃ F_pP
preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃
  (weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
     G_weq F_pP)


C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃ F_pP
preserves_exponentials E₂ E₃
  (weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_binproducts C₂ C₃ α
     G_weq F_pP)

  
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃ F_pP
BinProducts C₁
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃ F_pP
preserves_exponential_objects ?P₁ P₃ F_pP

  
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃ F_pP
BinProducts C₁
 exact P₁. 
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃ F_pP
preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP


  
C₁: category
C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₃
G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
P₂: BinProducts C₂
E₂: Exponentials P₂
P₃: BinProducts C₃
E₃: Exponentials P₃
G_weq: is_weak_equiv G
F_pP: preserves_binproduct F
F_pE: preserves_exponentials E₁ E₃ F_pP
t:= preserves_exponentials_to_preserves_exponential_objects
  P₁ P₃ F_pP E₁ E₃ F_pE: preserves_exponential_objects' P₁ P₃ F_pP E₁
preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP

  exact (preserves_exponential_objects'_to_preserves_exponential_objects P₁ P₃ F_pP t).
Qed.
